name: putnam-journal
description: A spaced-repetition Putnam problem journal for Cloudflare Pages, Workers, D1, and R2.

scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node --test shared/*.test.js && npm run build
scripts.dev:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply putnam-journal --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply putnam-journal --remote
